final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration
Asset type: children's picture book illustration, print-ready
Primary request: a chubby little brown bear collecting acorns in an autumn forest, wearing blue striped overalls and an oversized red beret
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn forest with golden and orange fallen leaves on the ground, sunlight filtering through trees creating dappled shadows, a small wooden cabin with chimney smoke in the distance
Subject: round, plump brown bear with rosy pink cheeks, endearing and innocent expression, chubby paws holding a pile of acorns, wearing blue striped overalls and a slightly oversized red beret
Style/medium: children's book illustration, blend of Studio Ghibli animation and Nordic illustration styles, rounded soft linework, high color saturation, warm and cozy aesthetic
Composition/framing: mid-shot, bear as central focus with forest environment surrounding
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour sunlight filtering through autumn foliage, soft dappled light, cozy and heartwarming atmosphere
Color palette: warm autumn tones (golden yellow, burnt orange, rust red) + sky blue overalls + bright red beret + soft browns for bear fur
Materials/textures: soft rounded brushstrokes, smooth color blending, no harsh edges, gentle texture suitable for children's visual comfort
Constraints: maintain cute and innocent child-friendly aesthetic, bear must appear friendly and non-threatening, keep illustration style consistent with 3-6 age group picture books
Avoid: realistic fur texture, sharp angular lines, dark or scary elements, photorealistic rendering, complex details overwhelming for young children
